capabilities_used.evidence: 2026-04-09 明确发文："Most of your “valid” order blocks are completely wrong. That’s why price keeps violating your entries." 说明他不仅使用订单块，而且把它当成核心入场过滤器。
2026-04-10 关于 TAO："Elimdeki poz stop oldu... 243 altı stoplarım"，直接展示止损执行与重新评估，而不是死扛。
2025-08-29："$BTC dominance looks like it’s cooling off... we could see some real upside momentum in altcoins soon"；2025-05-31 也发过 "BTC Dominance || Dump it"，明显把 BTC.D 当成山寨轮动触发器。
多次围绕 ETF/机构买盘发声：2025-01-31 "21Shares files for a spot Polkadot ETF"；2024-08-31 "Holdings of US Bitcoin ETFs"；2026-04-09 还讨论现货 ETF 净流出与 BTC 价格背离。

2025-01-31："U.S. dollar stablecoins reached $192bn in supply"；2025-03-31："A massive $1 billion USDT mint has just occurred!"；2025-02-28："USDT's deployment on TON... $1.4B issued in 10 months"。他把稳定币扩张当作流动性燃料。
2025-07-31："Bitcoin long-term holders... still control 53% of the total supply"，说明他会用长期持币者供给结构强化长线多头叙事。
2025-08-29："Volatility’s back. Leveraging is tricky and too risky as ever." 他会先识别高波动 regime，再调整杠杆和执行方式。
2026-04-11："$BTC and $ETH are sitting at macro trend resistance, while $USDT.D is at daily trend support"，说明他会用更高周期趋势位来定义短线方向。
2025-05-31："$S || In demand zone✅ If $BTC holds here, we could see a 30–50% move." 这类表达显示他常在区间/需求区做预埋而非纯追突破。
2024-08-30 发过 "Meanwhile, Gold Hits All-Time High Closing Price"，2025-04-28 又转发 Tether 增持黄金支持 XAUT，说明他会观察黄金与加密的风险偏好切换。
2025-07-30："Federal Reserve leaves interest rates unchanged"；2025-07-30："Must now lower the rate!"。他会把利率环境当作风险资产流动性背景。
2024-04-29 专门发过 "Common Chart Patterns"，把 Inverse Head & Shoulders 列为 bullish 形态，说明其 TA 词典偏经典形态学。
同一条 2024-04-29 的图表教学推文中，将 Ascending Triangle 列为 bullish pattern，反映其基础模式识别框架。
2024-04-29 将 Falling Wedge 列为常见看涨形态；其附图中的 NAI 走势也体现出长期下行趋势线压制后等待上破的思路。
图片 7 中 NAI 日线长期低位横向压缩、成交量收缩后预期方向选择，虽然未直接标注布林，但其 setup 明显偏低波动压缩后突破。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Narrative-Catalyst Rotation
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Ranks trades by upcoming catalysts, headline momentum, ETF filings, token launches, ecosystem announcements, and sector attention rather than price action alone.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 按催化剂强弱做轮动，重点看 ETF 申请、生态发布、代币上线、合作新闻和赛道关注度，而不是只看 K 线。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 他高频转发并跟进 Polkadot ETF、Algorand 真实采用、RocketLab 合同、USDT mint、Top Trending Coins 等信息，并把这些直接转化为交易偏好。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Microcap Asymmetric Re-rate
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Targets low-market-cap tokens with a simple chart base plus a strong narrative, then frames them with high-upside re-rating targets such as 2x, 5x, or new ATH.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 专找低市值币种，在简单底部结构配合强叙事时下注，并用 2x、5x、创新高等重估目标表达交易逻辑。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: NAI、MIL、SPEC、METIS、LARRY 等推文里反复出现 "easy 4-5x", "5x from here", "towards $100M MCAP", "Ready for new ATH" 这类非对称收益表达。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Altcoin Conditional Long on BTC Stability
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: BTC 稳住前提下的山寨条件做多
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Only takes altcoin longs when BTC is holding support or moving sideways constructively; avoids isolated alt trades against a weak BTC tape.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 只有在 BTC 守住支撑或稳定横盘时才做山寨多单，避免逆着弱 BTC 环境单独做多山寨。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-05-31："If $BTC holds here, we could see a 30–50% move." 这几乎是他做山寨 setup 的条件句模板。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Simple Horizontal Target Projection
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Uses long trendline compression, visible horizontal resistances, and a straightforward upside path sketch instead of indicator-heavy forecasting.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 偏好用长期趋势线压缩、显眼水平阻力和手绘路径做目标投射，而不是堆叠大量指标。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图片 7 的 NAI 日线直接用下降趋势线、横向支撑和手绘上行路径给出 611% 空间，风格非常鲜明。

personal_quirks.quote: $BTC dominance looks like it’s cooling off 👀   If $BTC stays stable here, we could see some real upside momentum in altcoins soon.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先看 BTC 主导率和 BTC 本身是否稳定，再决定是否切到山寨进攻。

personal_quirks.quote: Volatility’s back. Leveraging is tricky and too risky as ever.  Not saying to sit this one out. Just make sure you’ve got the right setup.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 高波动不等于不做，但必须降低鲁莽杠杆，只做高质量 setup。

personal_quirks.quote: Most of your “valid” order blocks are completely wrong.  That’s why price keeps violating your entries.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 订单块不是随便画，结构定义错误会直接导致入场被反复扫损。

personal_quirks.quote: $TAO neden bu kadar düştü henüz elle tutulur bi haber göremedim. Elimdeki poz stop oldu şu an önemli bi bölgede olduğu içim bi tur daha denedim. 243 altı stoplarım
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 止损触发后可以在关键位再试，但新的尝试必须重新定义失效位。

personal_quirks.quote: $SPEC || Bought a big bag here ✅  Sitting around $2.2, easy 4-5x from here.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他喜欢在叙事明确的小币种上做高赔率重估型押注，并用倍数目标表达强观点。

unique_traits: 他不像纯技术派那样只围绕 K 线做判断，而是把新闻、ETF、稳定币供应、真实采用案例和山寨叙事热度一起纳入交易框架。图表上他偏好非常简化的结构表达：趋势线、水平位、需求区、目标投射，适合做中短周期 swing。与很多 TA 交易员不同，他明显兼具内容创作者属性，强烈偏好多头叙事和高赔率 altcoin 重估故事。

high_conviction_phrases: Targeting a minimum of 5x from here.
Last chance to enter before it takes off✅
low_conviction_phrases: What is going to happen tomorrow?
